author: doll-agent
content: Implemented constructors: masked_all(shape) (fully-masked from-zero array), masked_all_like(reference) (same shape as reference), masked_values(arr, value, rtol, atol) (masks where |x - value| <= atol + rtol*|value|), and the NOMASK sentinel constant. The arange/zeros/ones/empty/identity wrappers are not added because users construct via ferray::zeros/ones/etc. then wrap with MaskedArray::from_data — the patterns are explicit and short, and adding 12 thin wrappers would just duplicate the underlying API. masked_object / masked_outside / fromflex are deferred (out-of-scope: object dtype / structured-mask flex format).
